message:
fix(codegen): Add __code__ stub, del slice, and ArrayList comparison fixes

- Add CodeObject stub to runtime/builtins.zig for __code__ attribute
- Handle __code__ attribute access on functions in misc.zig
- Handle __code__ assignment as no-op in assign.zig
- Implement del list[a:b] slice deletion using replaceRange
- Fix ArrayList vs fixed array comparisons and 'in' operator
